questions.question: Create a set of numbers from the list [1, 2, 2, 3, 4, 4, 5]. What is the length of this set?
You have a dictionary {'a': 1, 'b': 2, 'c': 3}. Create a new dictionary that contains only the even numbers from the original dictionary. What is the value of the 'b' key in the new dictionary?

Create a nested dictionary {'x': {'a': 1, 'b': 2}, 'y': {'c': 3, 'd': 4}}. Then, iterate over the dictionary to print out the values of all the keys in the dictionary. What is the value of the key 'a' in the nested dictionary?
